serverInfo.name: kindex
serverInfo.title: Kindex
serverInfo.description: Persistent knowledge graph for AI-assisted workflows. Hybrid FTS5 + graph retrieval, context tiers, operational guardrails, session tags, reminders, dream-cycle consolidation, git-tracked .kin project context, and opt-in work policy enforcement.

transport.note: Kindex runs locally over stdio. Install via `pip install kindex[mcp]` and register `kin-mcp` with your MCP client. No public HTTP transport is exposed.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Hybrid FTS5 + graph search over the knowledge graph.

tools.name: add
tools.description: Capture a node with type (concept, decision, constraint, directive, question, skill, watch, checkpoint).

tools.name: edit
tools.description: Correct or extend an existing node according to its edit policy.

tools.name: supersede
tools.description: Replace an additive node while preserving history with a supersedes edge.

tools.name: context
tools.description: Return a tier-budgeted context block for injection.

tools.name: show
tools.description: Full details of a node including edges and provenance.

tools.name: ask
tools.description: Classified question answering with LLM or context-only mode.

tools.name: learn
tools.description: Bulk-extract concepts from long text.

tools.name: link
tools.description: Create a weighted edge between two nodes.

tools.name: list_nodes
tools.description: List nodes filtered by type, tag, audience, or owner.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Graph health and active operational nodes.

tools.name: suggest
tools.description: Bridge-opportunity suggestions between disconnected clusters.

tools.name: graph_stats
tools.description: Nodes, edges, density, components, average degree.

tools.name: graph_heal
tools.description: Diagnose graph health: orphans, components, weak nodes, bridge edges.

tools.name: graph_merge
tools.description: Merge two nodes with edge reconciliation.

tools.name: dream
tools.description: Consolidation cycle: fuzzy dedup, suggestion auto-apply, domain edge strengthening.

tools.name: changelog
tools.description: What changed in the graph over a time window.

tools.name: ingest
tools.description: Ingest from projects, sessions, files, commits, github, linear, or code.

tools.name: tag_start
tools.description: Start a named session tag.

tools.name: tag_update
tools.description: Update the active session tag (focus, remaining, segment, end).

tools.name: tag_resume
tools.description: Resume a previous session tag — returns a context block.

tools.name: task_add
tools.description: Create a task linked to related concepts.

tools.name: task_done
tools.description: Mark a task complete.

tools.name: task_list
tools.description: List open tasks, optionally filtered.

tools.name: task_claim
tools.description: Claim a task for an agent with an expiry.

tools.name: task_release
tools.description: Release or override a task claim.

tools.name: coord_start
tools.description: Start a short-lived agent coordination conversation.

tools.name: coord_join
tools.description: Join a coordination conversation and get a read cursor.

tools.name: coord_post
tools.description: Post a coordination message.

tools.name: coord_read
tools.description: Read coordination messages since a cursor.

tools.name: coord_attach
tools.description: Attach a graph node as a shared coordination resource.

tools.name: coord_inject
tools.description: Set, clear, or list standing messages for coordination members.

tools.name: coord_list
tools.description: List coordination conversations.

tools.name: coord_end
tools.description: End a coordination conversation with an optional summary.

tools.name: lock_acquire
tools.description: Acquire an advisory lock on a node.

tools.name: lock_release
tools.description: Release an advisory lock on a node.

tools.name: watch_add
tools.description: Flag something for ongoing attention with owner and expiry.

tools.name: watch_list
tools.description: List active watches.

tools.name: watch_resolve
tools.description: Resolve a watch.

tools.name: remind_create
tools.description: Create a reminder with optional shell action or agent instructions.

tools.name: remind_list
tools.description: List pending reminders.

tools.name: remind_snooze
tools.description: Snooze a reminder by duration.

tools.name: remind_done
tools.description: Mark a reminder complete.

tools.name: remind_check
tools.description: Check for due reminders.

tools.name: remind_exec
tools.description: Execute a reminder's action.

tools.name: mode_activate
tools.description: Activate a conversation mode — emits the priming artifact.

tools.name: mode_list
tools.description: List available modes.

tools.name: mode_show
tools.description: Show a mode's primer, boundary, and permissions.

tools.name: mode_create
tools.description: Create a new conversation mode.

tools.name: mode_export
tools.description: Export a mode (PII-stripped).

tools.name: mode_import
tools.description: Import a mode from JSON.

tools.name: mode_seed
tools.description: Seed the five default modes (collaborate, code, create, research, chat).
